name: Select Document
uri: N/A — client-side state change only; no route change on selection
notes: onClick at line 873 (card view) and line 915 (list view) both dispatch handleDocumentClick(doc); the same handler covers both view modes.
handleDocumentClick sets DocumentGrid.state.selectedDocument and propagates to parent App via onDocumentSelect prop callback.
App.handleDocumentSelect sets showPreview=true, which mounts PreviewPanel — no URL route change occurs.

PreviewPanel lazily fetches GET /api/documents/{id}/preview only for previewable MIME types (application/pdf, image/jpeg, image/png, image/gif); non-previewable selections show a static message with no HTTP call.
